decision: Replaced generic Lucide glyphs for AI coding agents with real brand marks (inline monochrome SVG, fill=currentColor, drop-in for Lucide, sized via className) in new components/icons/AgentIcons.tsx. Wired into both live layouts: tree (app/ai-coding/page.tsx AI_TOOLS) and tabs (AgentTabsLayout TOOL_META + Launch dialog). Also updated latent SessionTabs/NewSessionModal iconMaps for consistency.
notes: Kiro excluded per operator. Marks from official simple-icons (nominative use). Verified visually via Playwright against fresh production build.
